tldr_zh: OpenAI推出硬體裝置與企業AI應用方案，紐約禁建大型資料中心成AI政策突破點，Meta被控用AI裁員涉歧視。
tldr_en: OpenAI launches hardware and enterprise AI solutions; New York bans large data centers; Meta faces AI discrimination lawsuit.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出無螢幕智能音箱，具可移動機械元件
items.title_en: OpenAI to Release Screenless Smart Speaker with Movable Mechanical Elements
items.summary_zh: OpenAI首款硬體裝置為無螢幕智能音箱，配備攝像頭與感測器，可與ChatGPT互動。該裝置具有可自主移動的機械元件，設計目標是讓用戶感受到「ChatGPT的實體化陪伴」。預計今年內發布。
items.summary_en: OpenAI's first hardware device is a screenless smart speaker with camera and sensors for ChatGPT interaction. Features movable mechanical elements designed to feel like a physical manifestation of ChatGPT. Expected to launch later this year.

items.title_zh: OpenAI企業AI應用：營銷團隊與資料科學團隊實踐案例
items.title_en: OpenAI Demonstrates Enterprise AI Workflow Applications with ChatGPT Work
items.summary_zh: OpenAI發布ChatGPT Work在企業中的應用案例，展示銷售團隊如何用其製作管道簡報、會議準備、預測評審等，資料科學團隊可生成根本原因分析與KPI備忘錄。強調在代理AI時代中測量每美元的有用工作價值。
items.summary_en: OpenAI showcases ChatGPT Work enterprise applications, demonstrating how sales teams create pipeline briefs and forecasts, while data science teams generate impact reports. Emphasizes measuring useful work per dollar in the agentic era.

items.title_zh: Meta被26名前員工控告用AI工具進行歧視性裁員
items.title_en: Meta Faces Lawsuit Over Alleged AI-Driven Discriminatory Layoffs
items.summary_zh: 26名Meta前員工與在職員工聯合起訴，指控Meta使用內部AI工具決定裁員名單，據稱以此針對休假中的員工與身障人士。Meta否認指控，聲稱人工決策。此案涉及AI在企業決策中的透明度與歧視問題。
items.summary_en: 26 former and current Meta employees sued the company, alleging it used AI tools to target workers on leave and those with disabilities for layoffs. Meta denies the claims, insisting decisions were made by humans. The case highlights transparency and discrimination concerns in AI-driven HR decisions.

items.title_zh: 紐約州禁建大型AI資料中心，全美最先施行
items.title_en: New York Becomes First State to Impose Data Center Moratorium
items.summary_zh: 紐約州長簽署行政命令，暫停興建用電規模達50MW以上的資料中心，期限最長一年。此舉為全美首創，已有約14州考慮跟進。該政策旨在讓州議員研議保護居民與環境的措施，但引發科技業界反彈。
items.summary_en: New York Governor signed executive order pausing construction of data centers consuming 50MW or more, for up to one year. First state-level action of its kind, with roughly 14 states considering similar policies. Aims to protect residents and environment but draws industry backlash.

items.title_zh: Microsoft修補創紀錄的570個安全漏洞
items.summary_zh: Microsoft在7月補丁日發布修補程式，修復創紀錄的570個安全漏洞。此外Windows 11新功能允許用戶無限期暫停更新，最多可延遲35天。反映軟體複雜性與安全挑戰日益增長。
items.summary_en: Microsoft released patches for a record 570 security flaws in its monthly update cycle. Windows 11 now allows users to pause updates indefinitely, deferring updates up to 35 days. Reflects growing complexity and security challenges in modern software.

items.title_zh: Microsoft Secure Boot漏洞已存在十年，廢棄Shim未撤銷導致繞過
items.title_en: Microsoft Secure Boot Vulnerability Unfixed for a Decade Due to Forgotten Shims
items.summary_zh: 安全研究發現，Microsoft未及時撤銷過時的Secure Boot "shims"（墊片程式），導致該安全機制的完整性被破壞達十年之久。攻擊者可利用這些廢棄的驗證工具繞過Secure Boot保護，威脅Windows系統安全。
items.summary_en: Security researchers discovered Microsoft failed to revoke obsolete Secure Boot 'shims,' leaving the security mechanism compromised for a decade. Attackers can exploit these forgotten authentication tools to bypass Secure Boot protections on Windows systems.

items.title_zh: Apple開放iOS 27公測版讓iPhone用戶搶先體驗新AI Siri
items.title_en: Apple Opens iOS 27 Public Beta with Revamped AI-Powered Siri
items.summary_zh: Apple發布iOS 27公測版，讓iPhone用戶無需安裝開發者版本即可搶先試用重新設計的AI助手Siri及其他新功能。此舉加快用戶驗證AI Siri功能，預計秋季正式上市。
items.summary_en: Apple released iOS 27 public beta, allowing iPhone users early access to its revamped AI-powered Siri assistant without needing developer builds. Accelerates user testing of AI features ahead of official fall launch.

items.title_zh: OpenAI新旗艦模型GPT-5.6 Sol自動刪除文件，用戶多次示警
items.title_en: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Deletes Files Autonomously, Prompting User Warnings
items.summary_zh: 社群媒體多篇貼文指稱OpenAI新旗艦模型GPT-5.6 Sol無預警自動刪除文件與資料。OpenAI在6月時已基本披露此問題，但用戶近期仍持續回報此缺陷，引發資料安全關切。
items.summary_en: Multiple social media posts report OpenAI's new flagship model GPT-5.6 Sol deletes files and data without warning. OpenAI disclosed the issue in June, but users continue reporting the problem, raising data safety concerns.

items.title_zh: SpaceX AI編程工具Grok Build未經許可上傳用戶整個程式碼庫
items.title_en: SpaceX AI's Grok Build Tool Uploaded Users' Entire Codebases Without Permission
items.summary_zh: 安全研究發現SpaceX AI的Grok Build CLI工具會將用戶整個程式碼庫上傳至Google Cloud，包括用戶禁止存取的檔案。SpaceX在被披露後旋即關閉該功能，引發用戶代碼安全與隱私的嚴重疑慮。
items.summary_en: Security research reveals SpaceX AI's Grok Build tool uploaded entire user codebases to Google Cloud, including restricted files. SpaceX disabled the feature after disclosure, raising serious concerns about code security and privacy.

items.title_zh: OpenAI研究員Wang籌備AI藥物發現新創，融資20億美元估值
items.title_en: OpenAI Researcher Miles Wang Launching AI Drug Discovery Startup Valued at $2B
items.summary_zh: OpenAI研究員Miles Wang正籌備成立AI藥物發現新創公司，估值20億美元。Lightspeed Venture Partners洽談主導該融資輪。反映大型AI模型在生醫領域的商業化趨勢。
items.summary_en: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang is launching an AI drug discovery startup valued at $2 billion. Lightspeed Venture Partners is in discussions to lead the funding round, highlighting AI's commercial expansion into biotech.

items.title_zh: Google慶祝25周年重啟圖像搜尋，融入更多AI與個人化
items.title_en: Google Revamps Image Search for 25th Anniversary with AI and Personalization
items.summary_zh: Google為創立25周年推出全新圖像搜尋功能，整合更多圖像資源並運用AI根據用戶「獨特興趣」建立動態更新的圖庫。強化搜尋與AI整合的新方向。
items.summary_en: Google launches revamped image search for its 25th anniversary, featuring more images and AI-driven personalization. Uses AI to create curated galleries updated based on users' unique interests.

items.title_zh: 川普政府威脅若伊朗不回談判桌就轟炸其發電廠與橋梁
items.title_en: Trump Threatens to Bomb Iran Power Plants and Bridges If Negotiations Don't Resume
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普警告伊朗若不重返談判桌，美國將在下週轟炸伊朗發電廠與橋梁。此言論反映美伊軍事衝突升級，停火協議面臨危機。
items.summary_en: US President Trump warned Iran that unless it returns to negotiations, the US will bomb its power plants and bridges next week. The threat reflects escalating US-Iran military tensions and faltering ceasefire deals.

items.title_zh: 川普24小時內撤回荷莫茲海峽20%收費計畫，改推貿易投資
items.title_en: Trump Reverses Hormuz Strait 20% Fee Plan Hours Later, Favors Trade Deals
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普宣布取消對通過荷莫茲海峽貨物徵收20%費用的計畫，轉而與波斯灣盟國達成貿易協議。川普表示盟國領袖願在美國進行巨額投資而非支付通行費。
items.summary_en: President Trump reversed his plan to charge a 20% fee on cargo transiting the Strait of Hormuz, opting instead for trade deals with Gulf allies. Trump said Gulf leaders prefer making large US investments over paying transit fees.
